title: Ultimate 500+ Blocks
description: 500 New blocks for minecraft + Support create
body:
View the whole bio on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smartultimate-blocks

![Mod information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69783c039e7add967650db3b9ce120c44463954b.png)

Hello everyone! 👋 Welcome to my mod ( MysticRift: Ultimate Blocks ) This mod adds a total of: 540 new Colored blocks to your minecraft server. (SEE SPOILERS) You can make these blocks via the new ores that have been added to the mod, (NOT EVERY BLOCK NEEDS THE ORE) no idea how the mod works? ask in the comments. For bugs you have to go to the tab (Issue) 1.20.4 is currently in development (Forge&Neoforge)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/238fc46ab99c072ff5c0c58557c8cc5247d791f4.png)


![in development.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1454bb60c61305b6b81dd7908a0b9088a34b4ec.png)

- Cut Copper  Coming in: 15.2.4 ✔️
- Copper block Available in: 15.2.3 version ✔️
- Tuff block ✔️

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/238fc46ab99c072ff5c0c58557c8cc5247d791f4.png)

![we recommend you to:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b590349b38ea4744c4acc4d3658a0eb8f4d9be53.png)

Download: [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
